findings.blocker: NEW blueprint gap: the flat-whiskering route requires SECTIONWISE flatness over EVERY open `∀ U, Module.Flat (𝒪_X(U)) (P.val U)`, which is NOT derivable from `IsInvertible` and is FALSE in general (⊗-invertibility is a local/affine property; over a non-affine open the global-sections functor is not exact). The blueprint's 'invertible ⇒ projective ⇒ flat' step conflates global module-invertibility with sectionwise-over-all-opens flatness. Compounding Lean friction: `X.ringCatSheaf.val` only defeq (not syntactically equal) to `X.presheaf ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat`, breaking monoidal ▷ synthesis and the Module.Flat instance key, hitting synthInstance + whnf maxHeartbeats timeouts.
